title: Wood Armor
description: Wood Armor is a lightweight, armor mod that bridges the gap between starting your world and finding your first ores.
body:
Wood Armor is a new mod adding detailed and easy to craft and use armor. With Stats in between Leather, and Iron, its a great starting place for any person.


# Future Changes

Plans to possibly make different varients - Would need one wood armor + the wood type to get that color.
